_source: Extracted from UD_Welsh-CCG r2.18 (train+dev splits; test split held out for coverage), CC BY-SA 4.0, Heinecke & Tyers 2019 (https://github.com/UniversalDependencies/UD_Welsh-CCG). Radical forms recovered via the Mutation feature + lemma initial (pipeline/radical.ts). Regenerate: npm run ud:fetch && npm run ud:extract.
